purpose: Route requests across one related skill family without hiding the leaf skill boundary.
selection_order: State the first routing rule here.
State the second routing rule here.

children.name: child-skill-name
children.summary: What this child does and how it differs from siblings.
route_when: Concrete signal that should select this child.
Second routing signal for this child.
avoid_when: Case where this child should not be selected.

install_if_missing.notes: Install this child before routing when the runtime cannot discover it automatically.
